rules.name: AG General Pattern
rules.description: Matches generic company names ending in AG, with stricter context checks to avoid matching common nouns. Requires at least two words before AG or a specific structure.

rules.name: KG General Pattern
rules.description: Matches company names ending in KG, with strict context checks. Excludes 'Co KG' as a standalone match and ensures a proper name precedes it.

rules.name: Bundesministerium General

rules.name: FA General Location
rules.description: Matches 'FA' followed by a location, excluding known multi-word entities. Refined to be more robust.

rules.name: VfGH Acronym
rules.description: Matches the acronym 'VfGH' (Verfassungsgerichtshof) as a standalone organization, excluding cases where it is followed by dates (citations).

rules.name: VwGH Acronym

rules.name: Bundesfinanzgericht Full

rules.name: Verwaltungsgerichtshof Specific
rules.description: Matches 'Verwaltungsgerichtshof' and its genitive forms 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofes' and 'Verwaltungsgerichtshofs', including the optional acronym '(VwGH)'.

rules.name: Rechtsanwaltskanzlei Pattern

rules.name: Sozialversicherung Pattern
rules.description: Matches 'Sozialversicherung' followed by 'der' and a group (e.g., 'der Bauern', 'der Selbständigen').

rules.name: Partnerschaft Pattern
rules.description: Matches organizations ending in 'Partnerschaft' (e.g., 'Partnerschaft M. Müller').

rules.name: Universität General
